name: Service Metadata
description: Contextual data about a service or daemon, which may include information such as name, display name, service executable path, start type (auto/manual/disabled), and the user account under which it runs. This data reflects the current configuration and state of services on a system.

commands.command: sc queryex type= service state= all
commands.description: Displays detailed status for all services, including PID and exit codes.

commands.command: Get-Service | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status, StartType, ServiceName
commands.description: Retrieves service objects with status and configuration properties.

commands.command: wmic service get Name, StartName, PathName, StartMode, State
commands.description: Queries WMI for service configuration details including the binary path.

registry.description: Registry keys containing the static configuration (Image, Start Type, Account) for every service.

systemd.description: Lists all loaded service units and their active states.

init_system.description: Lists services and their runlevel configuration (for SysVinit systems).

files.description: Service unit files and scripts defining metadata.

launchd.description: Lists loaded launchd jobs, their PIDs, and last exit status.

files.description: Property list (.plist) files defining service parameters.

cross_platform.query: SELECT name, path, start_type, status, user_account FROM services;
cross_platform.description: Retrieves standardized service metadata across operating systems.

log_sources.Name: auditd:CONFIG_CHANGE
log_sources.Channel: delete: Modification of systemd unit files or config for security agents

log_sources.Name: esxi:hostd
log_sources.Channel: Stop VM or disable service events via vim-cmd

log_sources.Name: kubernetes:audit
log_sources.Channel: kubectl delete or patch of security pods/admission controllers

log_sources.Name: linux:syslog
log_sources.Channel: Service restart with modified executable path

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Observed loading of new LaunchAgent or LaunchDaemon plist

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Modification of system configuration profiles affecting security tools

log_sources.Name: networkdevice:config
log_sources.Channel: write: Startup configuration changes disabling security checks

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:System
log_sources.Channel: Service stopped or RecoveryDisabled set via REAgentC
